top_constraints.description: Out = Nil; Limit Snowtown WF generation to avoid Snowtown - Bungama line OL on loss of Hummocks - Waterloo line.[Note: Constraint Swamped when Wattle PT when generating >=60 MW)
Out= Nil, avoid O/L of one Robertstown 275/132kV TX on trip of other Robertstown 275/132kV TX, Feedback
